products.name: Boson
products.descriptor: LWIR uncooled OEM thermal camera module family, 12 µm pixel pitch, 640×512 or 320×256

evidence.snippet:
Modulo videocamera termica OEM a infrarossi a onde lunghe (LWIR) non raffreddato
Boson
*   Produzione ad alto volume con disponibilità immediata
*   Conforme NDAA e classificato secondo la giurisdizione del Dipartimento del Commercio degli Stati Uniti come EAR 6A003.b.4.a

products.name: Boson+
products.descriptor: High-performance LWIR uncooled OEM thermal camera module with ≤20 mK NEdT sensitivity

evidence.snippet: ##### Performance-Driven NDAA-Compliant Imaging Portfolio:

*   [**Boson+**](/episerver/CMS/Content/,,7/products/boson-plus,,15888__CatalogContent/?epieditmode=False): High-performance Boson variant offers industry-leading thermal sensitivity with a noise equivalent temperature difference (NETD) of less than 20 millikelvin.
##### [Boson**+**](/it-it/products/boson-plus/)

products.name: Boson+ CZ
products.descriptor: Boson+ LWIR camera module integrated with 5× continuous-zoom lens for simplified UAS integration

evidence.snippet: ##### Performance-Driven NDAA-Compliant Imaging Portfolio:

*   [**Boson+ CZ**](/episerver/CMS/Content/,,7/products/boson-plus-cz,,18215__CatalogContent/?epieditmode=False): Combines the Boson+ LWIR camera module and 5x CZ lens, offering a high–performance imaging solution and simplified integration.

[![Boson+ CZ 14-75](/globalassets/imported-assets/image/boson-plus-cz---product-image-prc-refl-500px.png)](/it-it/products/boson-plus-cz/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)
### [Boson+ CZ 14-75](/it-it/products/boson-plus-cz/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)
Modulo termocamera OEM a infrarossi a onde lunghe (LWIR) ad alte prestazioni non raffreddato
*   Risoluzione 640 x 512
*   Sensibilità termica ≤20 mK \[NEdT\]
*   HFoV da 6° a 30°
[Visualizza prodotto](/it-it/products/boson-plus-cz/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)

products.name: Hadron 640
products.descriptor: Dual thermal+visible OEM camera module integrating 640×512 radiometric Boson sensor and 64 MP visible camera

evidence.snippet: ##### Performance-Driven NDAA-Compliant Imaging Portfolio:

*   [**Hadron 640**](/episerver/CMS/Content/,,7/products/hadron-640,,15924__CatalogContent/?epieditmode=False): Integrates a 64MP visible camera with a 640 × 512 radiometric Boson thermal sensor in a single module for streamlined integration in uncrewed systems.

[![Hadron 640](/globalassets/imported-assets/image/hadron-family---product-image-prc-refl-600px.png)](/it-it/products/hadron-640/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)
### [Hadron 640](/it-it/products/hadron-640/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)
Modulo con doppia telecamera OEM nel visibile e termica ad alte prestazioni
*   Risoluzione termica 640 x 512
*   Telecamera visibile 64 MP
*   Radiometria disponibile
[Visualizza prodotto](/it-it/products/hadron-640/?vertical=lwir&segment=oem)

products.name: Neutrino IS
products.descriptor: HOT MWIR camera module integrated with continuous-zoom lens, 640×512 or 1280×1024, SWaP-optimized

evidence.snippet: ##### Performance-Driven NDAA-Compliant Imaging Portfolio:

### [Neutrino IS Series](/products/neutrino-integrated-solution/)
HOT MWIR Camera Module + Continuous Zoom Lens
*   640 × 512 or 1280 x 1024 Resolution
*   Up to 27,000 Hours Cooler MTBF
*   Up to 60 Hz

unresolved_questions: Neutrino LC, SX8, QX, SX12 individual product specs (resolution, FPA size, cooler type) could not be verified — dedicated product pages were skipped. The NDAA article groups LC/SX8 together and QX/SX12 together but does not distinguish their individual specs in the corpus.

Prism AI, Prism SKR, Prism C-UAS, and Prism ISP product detail pages were all skipped; descriptions are inferred from nav labels and one news headline only — pricing, compatibility, and specific capability claims are unverified.

Boson+ CZ has a model suffix '14-75' visible in related-product thumbnail text (resource-0903 line 833) suggesting it may be a specific zoom range SKU rather than a family; full product page was skipped.
LWIR Zoom Lens Assemblies NDAA status unknown — no explicit compliance claim found in the fetched corpus for the lens products specifically.
